scope: 5 hand-designed canonical DAGs (i5a1 Tier-1) â€” pre-impl fixtures, replan logic not yet built
T_star_method: V*(start) = critical-path longest distance to leaf via children_of+vstar (DAG topological max-cost). T*_pre = current schedule. T*_post = projected schedule after expected_replan_action delta applied. Hand-computed at fixture-design time; will be machine-verified once tool/roadmap_engine.hexa schedule()+replan() lands.

entries.name: soft_rich_diamond_drop
entries.rationale: Soft cycle Bâ†”C forces serial execution â†’ T*_pre=B+C+D+G=20+20+15+5=60. After dropping soft edges, B||C parallel â†’ max(B,C)+D+G=20+15+5=40.

entries.name: parallel_rich_bottleneck_split
entries.rationale: Pre: V*(S)=X(40)+P(8)+V(6)+G(3)=57 (P chunks parallel after X). Post: split X into 4 parallel chunks of 10 each â†’ V*(S)=10+8+6+3=27.

entries.name: seed_rich_alternative_inject
entries.rationale: Pre: G needs both Y_blocked(25)+Y_alt(18); Y_blocked stuck on S0(n_uses=0). max(Y_blocked,Y_alt)+G=25+3=28 but Y_blocked never resolves so effective T*_pre=âˆž in practice; budget-limited V*=28. Post: seed_inject swaps Y_blocked.deps[S0_missing]â†’S2_alt(n_uses=2), G can complete via Y_alt only path â†’ 18+3=21.

entries.name: compound_soft_parallel_seed
entries.rationale: Pre: V_join blocked by V*(X)=30, dominant; V*(S)=X(30)+V_join(8)+G(4)+5(S done)=47 (S done so 0). Post (after MCTS picks highest-reward delta â€” parallel_split on X): V*(X')=10+8+4=22 â†’ with parallel branches max(BR1=12,BR2=12,X'=10)+V_join(8)+G(4)=12+8+4=24; conservative envelope 35 to allow MCTS suboptimality vs upper-bound 0.8.

entries.name: negative_control_no_annotation
entries.rationale: Pre: V*(S)=0+N1(12Â·0.5=6 remaining)+N2(14)+N3(10)+G(5)=35; with S done(0)+N1_in_progress(6)+N2(14)+N3(10)+G(5)=35. Wait â€” recompute: status=in_progress at progress=0.5, remaining = 12*(1-0.5)=6, plus 14+10+5=35 + 6 = 41 from S. T*_pre=41. T*_post=null (replan returns None â€” no soft_deps, no parallel hint, no seed alts, no exp/learn nodes). Excluded from geo-mean per falsifier spec.

summary.expected_geo_mean_post_over_pre: (0.667 * 0.474 * 0.75 * 0.745)^(1/4) = 0.638 â€” well below 0.99 falsifier threshold (positive case)

fields_omitted_intentionally: hard_deps (parse_node falls back to deps[] when hard_deps absent)
eta (only used by learn-type nodes; none in fixtures)
